title: GetWebbed
description: Makes spiders use cobweb in their attacks!
body:
# GetWebbed
Makes spiders use cobweb in their attacks!

### Features
- 50% chance for spiders to place cobweb on the player on attack
- spiders blind the player when they are already trapped in a cobweb
- compatible with Fabric, Forge, NeoForge and Quilt

### Note
this mod will have a config soon
